rows.model_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount)::DOUBLE, 2) AS total_amount
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-01-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-02-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::DECIMAL(18,2),2) AS total_amount_feb_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= TIMESTAMP '2025-02-01 00:00:00'
  AND order_date < TIMESTAMP '2025-03-01 00:00:00'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0), 2) AS total_amount_march_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-04-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::NUMERIC,2) AS total_amount_april_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-04-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-05-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::NUMERIC, 2) AS total_amount_may_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-05-01'
  AND order_date < DATE '2025-06-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0), 2) AS total_amount_june_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-06-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-07-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::NUMERIC,2) AS total_amount_july_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= '2025-07-01' AND order_date < '2025-08-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0), 2) AS total_amount_aug_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-08-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-09-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0), 2) AS total_amount_sept_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-09-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-10-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0.0),2) AS total_amount_oct_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-10-01'
  AND order_date < DATE '2025-11-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0), 2) AS total_amount_nov_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND order_date < DATE '2025-12-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0),2) AS total_amount_dec_2025
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-12-01' AND order_date < DATE '2026-01-01'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::DOUBLE,2) AS total_amount
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-01-01' AND order_date < DATE '2026-01-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-01-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-02-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-02-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-03-01'
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-04-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-04-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-05-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-05-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-06-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-06-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-07-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-07-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-08-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2025-08-01' AND order_date < '2025-09-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-09-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-10-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-10-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-11-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-11-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-12-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2025-12-01' AND order_date < '2026-01-01'

SELECT to_char(min_month, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_with_max_total
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month_start, SUM(amount) AS total_amount,
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM orders
  GROUP BY month_start
) t
JOIN (
  SELECT MIN(month_start) AS min_month
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month_start, SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY month_start
    HAVING SUM(amount) = (SELECT MAX(month_total) FROM (
      SELECT SUM(amount) AS month_total FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)
    ))
  )
) m ON t.month_start = m.min_month
LIMIT 1

rows.model_sql:
SELECT ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*)::DOUBLE, 0),
4
) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-02-01'
  AND order_date < DATE '2025-03-01'

SELECT ROUND(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)),
    4
) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-04-01'

SELECT ROUND(
  1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
  NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)
,4) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-04-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-05-01'

SELECT ROUND(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)),
    4
) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-05-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-06-01'

SELECT ROUND(1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),4) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-07-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-08-01'

SELECT ROUND(
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
, 4) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-09-01' AND order_date < DATE '2025-10-01'

SELECT ROUND(
    1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)
,4) AS fraud_fraction
FROM orders
WHERE order_date >= DATE '2025-12-01' AND order_date < DATE '2026-01-01'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE NOT (o.customer_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id = o.customer_id))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE NOT (o.product_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM products p WHERE p.product_id = o.product_id))
